title: roll to me
lyrics: Yeah, ooh, ooh, I'm rolling over you Ooh, ooh, I'm rolling over you Ooh, ooh, it's time to roll, baby, I'm rolling over to you I know we've been sitting long, I know we've been sitting long I've been sitting here trying to come and hit the phone Trying to hear you come along If we could go to the mall and maybe shop inside, pass inside, phone on Baby girl had the bag, baby girl had the eyes and the rack Baby girl have everything in my heart From me to you, it's finer than the Ooh, ooh, come on, just Ooh, ooh, I'm rolling over to me Come on, ooh, ooh, why don't you roll over here Roll to me, yeah Take away your, your fear Baby know the night's level, baby know the crime level It goes down a little over here, then we're up to the next time To the next dance, there's no more Pocket table, understand that romance Friendship level, oh my God, oh my God Can you hear the chorus, universal voice lines Universal thought patterns, desire set Ooh, ooh, yeah Ooh, ooh, yeah, roll over to me Ooh, ooh, yeah, it's just me Just ooh, ooh, come, come on, roll me I, I, I, I Think we could fly tonight I think there's much more to you than you give, you crave for I'd like to find that you, maybe explore Do a little bit of dirty dancing on the floor But if you roll with me, I'll roll with you If you roll with me, I'll roll with you Till the end of the life, the pattern of my desires I'll keep your heart on fire, baby, screaming Ooh, ooh, yeah I said, ooh, ooh, yeah Come and roll with me, baby I said, ooh, ooh, what are you thinking behind that facade? The mess and then all the times Can't you see my heart's screaming for you? Like, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh Ooh, don't let go No, no, no, I said, ooh, ooh Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah Ooh, ooh, yeah Just a little bit of fear could pass you now
